description: Negative fixture cases for the final go/no-go rehearsal gate. Each case is a complete rehearsal that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; ci/check_go_no_go_rehearsal.py loads it and asserts validation rejects it with the expected check id.

cases.summary: A Go stage rides a rehearsal packet whose freshness-SLO state is breached.
A No-Go stage renders a Stable effective label instead of dropping below the cutline.
A stage records a claim label wider than the stable claim manifest publishes for its backing claim.
